star_1.text: I was promised lots of rewards for pre-registering including many summons, diamonds, and a critter. I didn't get my diamonds or my free summons. Also, the game is very generic and not fun. The tower defense part of it is boring and you are forced to do It for the growth mission. Even almost a thousand summons did not get me a single legendary monster. Everything is locked behind the guide quest. The game is not exiting or engaging. I'll play it for a while longer and update my rating.

This game, just like the actually summoners war, is just a neverending cash grab with no payoff. I started day 1 with the idea that TD and afk grinding would be a new type of concept for me to try. Overtime however it became less about strategy and more about how much money you can poor into the next new character with even bigger...proportions. Don't fall for the ploy of a new game mechanic, it's just as mindless

review for the game- was ok but fun was getting stale BUT... after a mistake on com2us end they over gave resources to some players and the initial response was you can keep it because it's on us. which made many mad and quit. then after it was ok and players quit they changed their decision and put players so negative in resources that playing for a year you might catch up to even and until then you cant do anything. 2nd time I've been burned by com2us and thousands usd wasted on them.

Com2us destroyed this game and their reputation with their unfair mistakes and inability to correct or even address them costing every play. This is the last com2us game I will ever play. Many players are currently looking into legal options to recoup funds spent on this game including myself
So so so bad devs. The game had a healthy playerbase, but they killed it first with the merges and now they keep increasing bosses' evasion, making the game unplayable for non spenders.
log in issues constantly with this game. frequent disconnects, server instability. I do not recommend playing this game. This company....

Players are encouraged to spend money to progress in systems that are currently defective. This was not clearly communicated in the store listing or in-game purchase prompts. Faulty bugs such as Magical orbs and Conquest of land which has been unresolved for the longest. Think twice before spending money.
Do not fall for the game that is all about the money grab. Developers need to be held accountable instead of punishing the people for their mistake. You lost alot of your paying players due to this.
Stopped working. Stuck on first screen (loading data / preparing to launch client). Issue persists after reinstall + wipe data

Game was great... until I upgraded my phone!!! Upgraded to a new Pixel 10 Pro XL and game keeps giving an error saying "PowerVR GPU devices NOT supported". It's been more than a week already and no fix yet. I'll update review score once I'm able to play again (IF IT EVER HAPPENS...)

Don't even bother downloading. The only reason Com2uS launched this game is because they want a cut of the ad revenue that other games are getting, but they know they can't implement that in their main game or it will kill it & their revenue streams entirely. This isn't a game—it's a platform for C2U to feed you nonstop ads so they have another revenue source. Downloaded just to leave this review. Shameful company with shameful practices—casino first, gameplay second. AVOID AT ALL COSTS!

can't even play, sad when you can download a game that says it's compatible with your phone but you open it to try it after playing all their Summoner war games, only for it to not work at all. I would have loved to try this because I am a long time Summoner wars player, but two different phone attempts and I can't even get past the loading screen.

Spent about $200 combined on passes and packs.... it's another gacha P2W menu simulator. I LITERALLY SPENT $54.99 on a magic orb pack at lv.23. It gave me nothing..... No new gear at all. 23K orbs and NO NEW GEAR. Think about that before you buy their "congratulations" packs. Amazing how they don't add substance to the game but instead make everything more spongey.

the game is quite fun, but the ads are overwhelming. I had to watch 2 ads to get one key for the daily dungeon, which is insane as it is. sometimes the ads will crash the game, closing it on its own, that won't give you the reward which makes you watch the Ad again. the ads are in the majority 60 seconds, which I find abusive.

This game basically takes the mechanics of every one of those cheap cash-grab idle games and mixes it with a clunky tower defense game. The game is generic and soulless, with a mind-numbing tutorial that doesn't clearly explain the game mechanics. Worst game in the Summoners War franchise. I do not recommend playing this.

Way too many ads, especially when you are a F2P-player. Lost interest in the game real quick. Clearly a P2W game and if you don't buy the ad-block bundle thing your life in this game is going to be hell. Can't be bothered to open this app after a long day to watch ads just to progress a little bit (imagine that doing everyday). Yeah bye.

I thought this was going to be another P2W game if you don't spend you will hit wall soon. heroes are super expensive to upgrade and adds everywhere is insane. would be nice if resources required to upgrade heroes was more or upgrades were not so expensive. logon do few collects log off wait 24hours repeat.

The game is quite enjoyable, but it has a serious problem with cheating. Many players have reported this issue to the developers, but the team hasn't done anything to address it. Currently, the top guild on the server is a cheater, and honest players are starting to leave the game because of it.

Declined the apps request to track the location of nearby devices (why would it require this?) and stuck looking at a black screen. Nothing loads, and I'm very uncomfortable with the requested access - I have NEVER had a game request this kind of information. I think I'll be uninstalling.

pixel 8 pro 6.11.25 started at launch and had a few freezers but now game freezes all the time. so much to the point where I can't play and refuse to try again. won't even try to reinstall even if they fix as I was top three on my server and will not pay to climb again.

star_2.text: I kinda like the idea of this game, a mix of gear collecting, idle, and tower defense. Problem is that it actually doesn't work and feels clunky to play. It is also riddled with ads, I spent probably 20 minutes watching them to get all the extra rewards. I won't be playing games with in ads anymore. I'm tired of companies trying to annoy players into spending money.

This game wants to be Summoners War. It wants to be a tower defense. It wants to be an idle battler. They're trying to be a lot of things at once, and the ultimate result is that it feels directionless and messy. Why play one game that does three things kind of poorly when you can play three games that do each thing masterfully well? SW:Rush just has its fingers in too many pies to be a solid game worthy of your time and money.

Blatant barebones short-lived soulless cashgrab. Used multiple genres, implemented none well. TD has too few maps and enemy variants, non-rng crystal skills ok. Elsewhere you wait to gain enough resources to win. Gameplay, story, and modes feel pointless or rushed. Skills kinda uninspired, crit effects on all characters unique but makes crit rate only viable stat (also some stats should be explained). Dungeon progression is beyond slow with its limited access. Why did I return to this franchise?

It's not a great spinoff of the IP. little thought or strategy into the gameplay. you can easily auto through everything with little effort. you will find the usual pay walls and forced wait times to make your "numbers" go big." short-term satisfaction. not their best game.

just another dumb waiting game I've seen this kind of game a lot and I'm a bit disappointed from com2us who I thought to be an important player in the game industry, able to create another really funny and challenging game. It feels more like they wanted to surf on a successful kind of game.

I'm stumped by this game. I love the whole cooky Summoners War world but that doesn't carry this game. When I start a game I expect to be able to spend some time playing but I was up against a dead end really soon. I couldn't figure my way around it. Maybe it's me but seems like you.

this feels like a lot of other afk games with extra steps. there seemed to be an interest in being like arknights but there doesn't feel like a connection and the monetization is horrible. I'm going to play through the rest of the quest line to see if I edit this response

cool game but needs a lot of work, feels like a beta. the game constantly freezes, usually when loading arena battles, and it runs so bad on my Google pixel9 pro XL in the lowest possible settings. the lag is huge, stutters, etc. please fix so I can give a better rating, thank you
fun game but after the update that happened last night I cant load i to the game no matter what I do please fix it!

bugs are why it's a low rating... playing for a month can't get a effing coupon to work. system always says already used or expired, but the in-game coupon screen shows they are valid and haven't been used. other wise game isn't bad
There are sooooo many better games around today. The graphics are dated, and the characters are generic and boring. The tower defense is unique and a nice touch, but not enough to be worth your time.
in true C2U fashion, everything in the game costs money, is outrageously expensive, and has money adds every 3 mins. Grubby. Drop rates are awful after 5 mins of playing.

It's not that impressive, I don't expect com2us to be the best game company just following a copy trended game like this, It's not great, many Chinese games are more strategy and nice game process. i feel a little disappointed.
the adds!! i know there is a add pack... but at least give 3 keys per add.... this is inase! its over half an hour adds per day just for the dungeon keys..
I don't think this company could make a good game if they tried cause they clearly didn't here. There is so many issues in the first 10 minutes of player I can't even fit them here.
There are so many systems and no tutorial to speak of. It's like a bunch of games rolled into one. Too much and too poor an execution for me.
not much to even review. the game takes nearly 5 minutes to even load. by the time I'm done waiting to even get into the game, I'd rather be doing something else.
game seems ok but the XP curve to level up after 30 is so excessive and if I need to level multiple units, that would take months
Ads doesnt have any close button. wth
Don't really understand this game and what you need to do, maybe I need to play more of it to figure tings out, but for now my rating stands because I don't really like this game.

star_3.text: I have been playing for over a week now and can provide a better review. this is a cool looking game with cool Heroes/Monsters, but a once a day game especially if free to play or low spending. If you have a crazy wallet you can easily be the top! I've only spent about $20 and I won't spend more as I see myself uninstalling in the near future!

Look, some folks dont mind constant blatant ads and love watching them for goodies. Not me. I get that paying to fully remove them is an option. But what happens afterwards? Do I get to see and play the game normally? Do the rewards behind ads suddenly get unlocked for free? Do the little red notification dots telling me I have not looked at a store deal/ad yet go away? I HATE not being able to make that note dot go away. Forcing me to watch ads to do so? Straight up wrong. Also too many passes.
i enjoy playing having issues with game loading and then failing to load. still cant get game to run, hopefully didnt lose my progression

Lowering my rating from five stars down to three. You guys killed the game with the server merge. A lot of this works really hard and spend a lot of money to reach high ranks on our servers only to be handed a massive setback. I went from top 3 to being pushed out of the top 10 completely. Ended of losing a lot of guild members because everybody started quitting and now I'm about to tap out as well because it's obvious I will never reclaim my rank without emptying my savings account.

Unfortunately as expected from nowadays com2us... It's an idle based game as a tower defense game in the story mode with their design on top of it. You level up monsters (summons), you grind out stats by investing resources ( farmable ) and you can pay for packages all over the place for heaps of money including ads removal... Give it a try if you feel like it, but this is nothing unique rather a one of a million soulless copy of already existing games.

want to like it more but latest update forced server mergers so spenders can prevent f2p from resources better. only getting more pay to play by the month. Edit: we need more free devilmons. even if we get good luck on unit rates we can't enjoy their skills. 5 a week from guild is the only source and frankly insulting.

I don't have anything bad to say. did have me feeling nostalgia about "summoners wars,"and I actually really do like that game, which always begs the question, "Why haven't they revamped/renew they're original game?" to bring in these great up data character designs that you're making of your old characters. So that we can feel that nostalgic feeling that I think you guys can make, but with new freshness to it. hopefully, something's in the work, possibly with a storyline 😄Well, happy gaming!

game isn't bad a lot like other idle games but the main reason I deleted the game was because of the chokehold on devilmon to upgrade your characters. sure more will come later but only dropping 10 on release with no other way to get them besides buying them was disappointing. if there was enough from rewards to at least max 1 character probably would have made a little bit of a difference but id rather just play the seven deadly sins idle.

A good basis for a game, this has potential, but right now with the small number of available characters and ultra-repetitive game play, interest in the game quickly fades. I quickly got all the characters and maxed their levels, there isn't anything left for me to do except make numbers bigger for the sake of making numbers bigger.

A good game with lots to do but very unstable in its early releases. The game freezes regularly and now I can't log in at all. constantly get error code NSE 10001. This hasn't been an issue until yesterday. Happy to revisit the score once the game is more stable.

UPDATE: Connection works now and got to play it a bit. AFK mixed with some tower defense mechanics. overall an ok game wrapped up in SW skins but doesn't actually feel like SW at all. Disappointed. Temporary placeholder until the game can actually be launched. right now it goes to connect to server and gives error CEC 20004.

F2P currently rank 81 in the "campaign mode" It's very F2P friendly, if you have crazy ADHD and looking for something to waste time or relax before bed it's a good option. I've been having crazy login issues. Just sits on the loading screen saying preparing game but nothing happens. Hopefully Uninstall and reinstall works. Maybe a couple of game crashes here and there nothing too major, also not a great idea to tab switch while playing this game, consistently needs to relog

Unless you pay to pay, your progress is going to be incredibly slow, but it's still fun. Also I haven't been receiving my rewards for my dungeons. I don't know how long this has been going on. So I don't know how much I actually lost. From all the work I did, but I noticed that today when I got a legend. Critter, ticket, and then it wasn't in my inbox. Or my item box, please fix this. This game was tedious enough, especially for players who don't pay. To play.

The art style is really disappointing. Also you have to watch ads to maximize the profit, which kinda sad. The guide feel somewhat lacking and most of the spell is random hit which sometime can be very frustrating.
the game is fun but after I logged out for the first time, I haven't been able to log in. multiple different errors have happened, I've even cleared my cache, data, and reinstalled.

some thing different change is good game is fun and different type of game if you're looking for just something to kill time this could be for you if you're looking for open world I'd say chronicles would be nice choice not summoner war's there's bots in arena and some thing wrong in world boss damage isn't adding up
I can only get to the game 50% of the time I launch the app, other times it hangs on the loading screen. And the actual gameplay is half baked and uninteresting.

this game is so much fun I can't lie there is so much to do and experience the worst and only bad part of the game is my game freezes on me every 15 minutes or so and I have a decent enough phone to run games on it's a Google pixel 9 pro please fix this I know it's early on into the launch but this is a must fix
The game is fun but the problem is it hangs at a certain point where it is literally unplayable and I have to restart the game again but it happens multiple times already.
The Game is fun but it freezes from time to time and never unfreezes, have to reload The Game and sometimes it takes forever to reload. Very inconvenient.

star_4.text: Now have some time in...solid game but it gets old pretty fast. In order to get all daily bonuses, you have to watch around 30 1 min videos or pay $9USD to get ad free. Wouldn't be so bad but there's no option to watch them all at once so you're forced to do each one separately. There also isn't a large monster pull so there is very little variety to teams. Pulling dupe mons is also very difficult so maxing them is hard for F2P. Not enough variety to make the different areas fun.

the below seems to have been fixed. been playing this game a ton, but the login issues are killer, and the very annoying 20004 error code, there isn't anything wrong with my wifi, everything else connects fine just not this one singular game.

The game is a fresh take on some old fave monsters and an AFK done right. Going from Legend Of Mushroom to this is eye-opening because that game was money hungry, rinse repeat. This has so much to do, and they have been updating frequently, which means they are avtually listening and watching. 5 stars if this behavior continues. I don't like how the passes are obviously cash traps, 1 price for all, we gotta do work to get prizes, stop trying to work our bank acct too. The ads crashing.
Really good game for summoners war fans but the battlefield (tower defense) could look better though. It doesn't feel satisfying enough to slay these monsters, if you know what i mean.
Fun game, lots of little things involved to keep you busy. Love the art for the monster profiles. Hoping to see new unique mons in the future.
Fun visuals and familiar characters. Very busy HUD with small Icons that can be overlooked. Early progression is smooth and definitely fits Coms2us business model.
game is ok. but the adds tend to take you away, cause the game to reload, and not give you the reward.
really fun game, I like the characters and noises .
good game fun to play if you play summoners war. but why the hell is there ads 🫩
when you update this game, it wants way more storage than it requires.

I have been playing the game Summoners Wars for 3 years and I would like this game to have Russian language, I thank the developers in advance and will wait for further actions in the CIS community, thank you for giving new life to the game!
It's good, but what about those Monster voice?
fun just like all the other games
seems like a decent Tower Defense game
it is just launch day. Still figuring it out

star_5.text: great game to play while doing other things, there's an issue I want them to address. summoners war I can take calls on my phone while playing the game and go back to it without any problems. with this game, if I take a call it will restart my game when I go back to it. it gets annoying at times as I can't ignore the calls for a game. other than that it's a good idle game, just don't expect it to be a super quick progression game unless you spend some money. it's a chill game so that's okay

so far for me the best idle games with collecting monsters. I've played lots of idle games, and for me nothing beats this. playable for F2P, if your competitive of course every game is the same, money can push you on top, still I like this game..
it must be an nft game...pls make it play to earn instead of lost centuria ,this game is so much potential in becoming nft game

I gotta say, the tower defense aspect is my favorite part of the idle game that makes this Summoner's War way more addicting than the original and any of the spinoffs. Very fun and worth the time playing since they really took a deep dive on idle mechanics and gameplay. They give you a ton of summons scrolls when first starting too which I thought was really cool. If you liked the Seven Deadly Sins Idle game, this one takes the W by a long shot.

the game is great so far I haven't had any problems runs smooth and I'm having fun already spent an hour already before even leaving a review that's how good it is looking forward to seeing the next updates for this game because it's easy to level up and watch it go idle for you

Summoners War Rush is an online RPG/Tower Defense game that has alot of content, excitement, and great gameplay!!! Com2Us does a great job creating another video game based on the Summoners War universe, this game is like Summoners War Chronicles, except on the go, anytime and anywhere!!! this would be when a great gaming studio cares about their product, A+!!! - deokumar gandharry

this game is so fun and addicting, I like every 3D or 2D design for every monsters they look so cool! many various mode to do, many quests, and so many more. My favorite one is the "defense" mode, this game is very generous too especially a new player like me.

this game has more love & attention than it has gotten. its nostalgic to anyone who has played Summoner wars before with great design, smooth gameplay, & a great twist to afk rpg genre. I'm looking forward to playing this game on a regular basis to see how far I can get without playing.

I've played SW Sky Arena and Chronicles since their releases. This game is a great mix of hands on and off gaming. I enjoy idle games and sometimes I like taking control. I got lots of rewards for pre registering. Free legendary mons daily. You do have to level up your summoning in order to summon legendary mons, but once I did that I've gotten so many. I enjoy this game probably way too much. The PVP side is pretty simple and can quick battle. overall I will play this game a lot.
Love the game very fun and addictive. The only complaint so far that I have is I would love to see a auto. Magic orb, summoning instead of manually summoning which takes a very long time

edit: okay, y'all did it! after figuring out it's a tower defense practically, otherwise you won't figure it out if you don't allow yourself to approach the challenge this way, you'll have no issue if you do that, thanks for this game y'all!!

I have been a fan of S Wars since the early 2010s so for me not much into defense towers games 🎮 then give it a try made like the game a bit more often. from the strength of knowing what series I-property this is. I just didn't think i enjoyed the defense tower genre ever again, I'm and ended up liking this. Here is my five star rating. There is currently nothing bad to say thus far.
I use this as stress relief. I demand nothing more than the few minutes of idling and small progression. Might be projection on my side but I really just enjoy this game.
Its an amalgamation of a lot of different mobile games but in the Summoner's War world. I'm enjoying it so far especially because its mainly a tower defense game.
You can tell that a lot of effort went into this game, they are engaging with the player base and releasing new content too. Great game.
pretty kool graphics and unique way of making a TDRPG.. it might some what pay to play idk i liked it so much I smartly spent 20$ usd on my first 2 hours. lol
a fun transition from summoners war into a new idle game. nice intro system and clearly targeted at both f2p and p2w. fun and engaging from the start
crystal rebate not woeking as intended got way less than i should and customer support stopped replying. its fixed already thanks
varied things to focus on but pretty easy to learn. no forced ads. so far it's great
best summoner wars game yet hand down so Gooooooood . whatever do don't remove the adds they help speeding up gamplay. sometime they bug
